name: list_managed_instances
description: Lists managed instances for a given managed instance group (MIG). For each instance, details include id, instance URL, instance status, and current action. Requires project, zone, and MIG name as input.

parameters.description: Request message for listing managed instances.

name.description: Required. Identifier. The instance group manager name.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of managed instances to return.

pageToken.description: Optional. A page token received from a previous call to list managed instances.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

zone.description: Required. The zone of the instance group manager.
